sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42979" key="e(/sthka" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἕστηκα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑστήξω</orth> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑσπέρ-ομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔστησα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔστην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑστηώς</orth>, <sense id="n42979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἵστημι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
